dataset_conflict.interpretation: 10d captured favorable bear-trending regime. 100d reflects mixed conditions. 12 of 17 active rules built from 10d need live validation.

graduated_rules_tracking_bug.root_cause: llm_regime field is empty ('') in all 10d trade records. When feedback/loop.py calls record_outcome(regime=''), regime-conditioned rules (eth_trending_regime_boost_v1, ranging_regime_penalize_v1, etc.) fail to match in the fallback path. Result: times_correct stays 0 for regime-conditioned rules.
graduated_rules_tracking_bug.clarification: graduated_rules.py EXISTS at bot/llm/graduated_rules.py — prior audit claim of 'file not found' was incorrect. The tracking mechanism is architecturally sound.
graduated_rules_tracking_bug.fix_needed: Populate llm_regime in CSV logger at close time. Alternatively, pass fired_rule_ids from evaluate_signal() to record_outcome() (preferred path already supported in code).
graduated_rules_tracking_bug.severity: MEDIUM — veto rules correctly have times_correct=0 by design; non-veto rule tracking degraded

hold_time_bug.root_cause: close_time before opened_at for fast TP1 hits — timestamp calculation bug
